'''Hoona''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Phlog/Legends|Phlog]] from the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. She was an adolescent just prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. During this time, [[Umwak]], the [[Dulok/Legends|Dulok]] [[Shaman/Legends|shaman]], made her inhale the fumes of a love potion created by [[Logray/Legends|Logray]] which caused her to fall in love with the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]].

==Behind the scenes==
Hoona's voice was supplied by [[Myra Fried]].<ref name="voice">{{BookCite|author=Perlmutter, David|title=The Encyclopedia of American Animated Television Shows|publisher=Rowman & Littlefield Publishers|date=2019-05-04|isbn=978-1538103739}}</ref>
